--- 
title: "Proteomic Data Analysis"
author: "Kyle Swovick"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
site: bookdown::bookdown_site
documentclass: book
bibliography: [book.bib, packages.bib]
description: |
  This is a guide on how to work with R and analyze LC-MS/MS proteomic data.
favicon: images/ur_logo_favicon.png
cover-image: images/CART_logo_horizontal.png
link-citations: yes
github-repo: rstudio/bookdown-demo
---

# Introduction {-}

This is a guide to help biologists at all levels analyze LC-MS/MS-based bottom-up proteomic data. 

Included in this guide are: 

- Basic explanations of R and RStudio
- Walk-through on each part of the proteomic data analysis pipeline including:
  - Data quality check
  - Data filtering
  - Handling missing values by imputation
  - Differential expression analysis using `limma`
  - Data visualization using `ggplot2`


```{r include=FALSE}
# automatically create a bib database for R packages
knitr::write_bib(c(
  .packages(), 'bookdown', 'knitr', 'rmarkdown'
), 'packages.bib')
```
